backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Bunsik app that includes blob storage mixin and exposes storeReservation and getReservations methods using an in-memory Map.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that defines the OldActor and NewActor types and initializes a fresh empty reservations Map during schema migration.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs and titles to their corresponding frontend source files, components, and test IDs for the Bunsik Korean Restaurant rebuild.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one-sentence descriptions of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose and content of each component, page, and config file.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes used across the application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO-optimized title and meta tags for Bunsik Korean Restaurant in Griffith NSW, mounting the React app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes the Header, Homepage, and Footer into a full-page flex layout.
frontend/src/components/AboutUs.tsx: About Us section displaying Bunsik's restaurant story, Griffin Plaza address, tappable phone link, a bibimbap image with overlay, and a 4.7-star decorative badge.
frontend/src/components/CallToAction.tsx: Empty file with no implemented content for the CallToAction component.
frontend/src/components/Experience.tsx: Empty file with no implemented content for the Experience component.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with Bunsik branding, social media icons, address, tappable phone link, quick navigation links, and a caffeine.ai attribution line.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed navigation header with scroll-aware background, smooth-scroll nav links, a 'Call Now' button, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, overlays, headline, and three CTA buttons linking to Menu, Order, and Reservation sections.
frontend/src/components/Location.tsx: Location section displaying the restaurant's address, phone number, and amenities (parking, accessibility, payments) alongside a Google Maps embed area.
frontend/src/components/Menu.tsx: Tabbed menu component with four categories (Street Food, Fried Chicken, Signature Meals, CUPBAP Bowls), showing a featured image and priced item list per category.
frontend/src/components/OnlineOrdering.t: Online ordering section with pickup and delivery call-to-action buttons (both linking to the phone number) and info badges for wait time and availability.
frontend/src/components/OpeningHours.tsx: Opening hours section that displays a weekly schedule, automatically highlighting today's row with a pulsing indicator and bold gold text.
A React form component for booking a restaurant table, with validation, error handling, and a success confirmation screen. Submits reservation data via the `useStoreReservation` mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/Reviews.tsx: Displays a paginated carousel of customer reviews for Bunsik Korean Restaurant in a dark-themed section with star ratings and reviewer info.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports the `useStoreReservation` mutation hook that calls the backend actor's `storeReservation` method and invalidates the reservations query cache on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties for the Bunsik brand color palette and design tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` wrappers around the root `App` component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Empty file with no content; the About page has not been implemented yet.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Empty file with no content; the Contact page has not been implemented yet.
frontend/src/pages/Homepage.tsx: Assembles the main homepage by composing all section components (Hero, AboutUs, OpeningHours, Menu, OnlineOrdering, ReservationForm, Reviews, Location) in order.
frontend/src/pages/MenuPage.tsx: Empty file with no content; the Menu page has not been implemented yet.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining the Bunsik brand color palette (gochujang reds, cream, charcoal, gold), custom font families, container settings, and plugin integrations for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state (version 3) for the Bunsik Korean Restaurant website, including architectural notes, feature list, image requirements, and known issues for a mobile-first Korean street food themed site in Griffith NSW.
